action_items.action: JESSICA AT RISK — HR FOLLOW-UP (HIGHEST PRIORITY PEOPLE ITEM). Jessica received her at-risk notification yesterday (12/05) and was 'a bit shocked' per Mike's update to Colin at 16:47. Mike had a call with her but also asked to 'jump back on quickly' at 16:04. Check in with Jessica first thing this morning: (1) How is she feeling today? (2) Ensure she knows the consultation timeline and her rights. (3) Agree what work she continues on (GDCU-8906 NL Tables, GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners). Coordinate with Colin and HR on next steps in the consultation process.

GDCU-8957 LOCAL NAV NEWS ARTICLES — SIGN OFF TODAY (THURSDAY RELEASE GATE). Chloe Christie confirmed at 11:19 yesterday: 'local navs will be available for news articles on Thursday's release.' Ticket is In Product (Carlos Blauth, Medium). QA verified by Robin John at 11:00 (desktop, mobile, no regressions on login/breadcrumbs). Mike's product sign-off is the final gate before Thursday's deploy. Review and approve or raise any issues today.

GDCU-8432 GEO LOCATE IMAGES GLOBAL HP — REVIEW (HIGH, IN PRODUCT). Ciara Carroll's ticket — flagged and HIGH priority. Updated 12/05 at 17:31 (Ciara adding image assets). This has been in the sprint for an extended period. Review Ciara's latest image additions and approve or provide feedback.

CHLOE CHRISTIE — FOLLOW UP ON INTERRUPTED CALL. Chloe messaged at 12:12 asking Mike to rejoin a call; Mike was pulled by Colin and apologised. The call context likely relates to Group Bets / WC Predictor deadline (their last substantive exchange on 05/05 was about June deadline and Group Bets elements reusable in Predictor). Reach out to Chloe today to pick up wherever they left off.

LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — CONFIRM CALENDAR TODAY. The 12–3pm interview slot was sought for Mon 12/05 or Wed 13/05. No Slack confirmation seen since 11/05. Today is Wednesday. Authenticate M365 or check calendar directly to confirm whether this is scheduled for today. If yes: prepare immediately. If rescheduled: reply to Liam to confirm new date.

VIC DADSON — RETURN PLAN. Vic is back (she had a hospital appt yesterday, spoke with Mike at 4pm, and 'seemed OK' per Mike's update to Colin). She's returning to work next week. Action: (1) Formalise return plan with Vic — Data Engineering support from Nemanja with clear reqs. (2) Brief Nemanja/Data Eng team on the agreed approach. (3) Confirm HR/sick note admin is in order.

GDCU-8847 VIP OPERATOR LIST — REVIEW. In Product 2+ days (Nebojsa Stanic, Medium, last updated 11/05 13:19). UK market feature: custom rev-share operator list for VIP users (ktag level ≥2). Was cleared through QA on 08/05. Mike's review is pending — approve or provide feedback to unblock Nebojsa.

GDCU-8924 ORIGINS API — FIND THE BLOCKER. Nebojsa Stanic's ticket shows as Blocked in progress (updated 12/05 14:42) with no comment explaining the blocker. This is a new block not in previous reports. Identify what's blocking Nebojsa and either unblock directly or escalate to Gabriel.

GDCU-8983 COSMO SPINS LOGIN HOTFIX — MONITOR QA. New ticket (created 12/05 by Chloe). Harden identified root cause: tab ID in localStorage not clearing on mobile Safari (beforeUnload not firing). Hotfix ready on ptest (https://ptest.gambling.com/games/cosmo-spins). Harden: 'Ready for Review'. Expedite QA given this is a live game issue.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — CHASE MATRIX TEAM. Still Blocked/In QA (last updated 06/05). Chloe's comment: 'Blocked until data is available via matrix team.' This has been stale for 7 days. Chase the matrix team today for a data availability ETA. If ETA is unclear, escalate with Gabriel Cornoiu.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — MONITOR. Harden's 06/05 update: Apple identity verification submitted (waiting on Apple); Google identity verification COMPLETE. Check with Harden for an Apple turnaround ETA — their verification typically takes 2–5 business days. This unblocks the full app store submission pipeline.

GROUP BETS & WC PREDICTOR — CHECK MIGUEL'S PROGRESS. GDCU-8904 (Group Bets Widget) and GDCU-8935 (WC Predictor) both show Miguel Migneco In Progress (updated 11/05). 11 June hard deadline. Yesterday's restructuring may have disrupted workflow — check in with Miguel: where is design on both? Is Group Bets design ready for KO call with Chloe?

GDCU-8392 WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN — CIARA STATUS. Flagged in sprint. Ciara is also on GDCU-8432 (Geo Locate, In Product) and GDCU-8619 (Operator List Redesign, In Progress). Check with Ciara on bandwidth and agree sequencing. Hard deadline: 11 June.

GDCU-8972 CLAUDE DESIGN IMPROVEMENTS — REVIEW CIARA'S TICKET. Ciara created this placeholder ticket yesterday (12/05 10:03) to track Claude design feedback action points, as discussed with Mike. Review and ensure it has the right scope and priority before it gets picked up.
